gist.headline: Painting by numbers
gist.blurb: We've centralized the dashboard color system, making it a breeze to re-theme pages with a single line of code. No more hunting down hardcoded hex codes!
gist.summary: Centralized the dashboard color system by introducing a per-theme token bundle for Tailwind classes, allowing one-line retheming of pages.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily update dashboard themes without hunting down hardcoded color classes across multiple components.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee wearing a painter's beret, holding a palette of colors, standing next to a dashboard UI wireframe. A robot companion is organizing paint buckets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a wooden paint palette next to a glowing dashboard wireframe. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head is organizing pastel paint buckets. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
